headline: 164 sample catalog entries and 19 agent implementation documents ingested; music production library expansion dominates.
summary: 164 drum and instrument samples from GDrive (predominantly multi-volume Beat Butcha sample packs, Electronisounds, essential_wav_16bit, and instrument-specific libraries) now indexed—representing substantial catalog growth for DAW integration. 19 Claude Code execution logs document agent infrastructure work: profiler refactoring (Textual TUI removal, --auto mode addition), axiom sufficiency implementation (architecture_rag check addition), vault_writer enhancements (1on1 prep generation), and health monitor fixes. 4 Obsidian vault notes added including Excalidraw architecture sketches. Total collection: 304.1k documents, 2.8k profile facts.

notable_items.title: Beat Butcha Filth Volume sample pack integration (vols 3-8)
notable_items.relevance: Continuous sample library catalog adds breaks, hats, percussion, and one-shots across 16-bit/24-bit formats; essential building blocks for current music production hyperfixation.

notable_items.title: Textual TUI removal + --auto mode for profiler.py
notable_items.relevance: Agent refactor streamlines profiler for headless execution and autonomous operator regeneration; reduces CLI friction for background health monitoring.

notable_items.title: Architecture RAG check added to sufficiency.py
notable_items.relevance: Extends axiom sufficiency verification to architecture patterns; closes gap in compliance monitoring between policy and implementation.

notable_items.title: 50 Cent/Diddy/Tyler hip-hop media analysis (YouTube)
notable_items.relevance: Liked video on rap media landscape and GRAMMY predictions; contextual input for music production direction and industry signal.

suggested_actions: Index Beat Butcha sample catalog into a searchable sample browser if not already routing through sampler devices
Verify --auto mode profiler behavior under sustained load (check watchdog reset behavior logged in a176a92c diff)
Review axiom sufficiency coverage: architecture_rag check is now in place; confirm other sufficiency gates (management_governance, corporate_boundary) are similarly comprehensive
